name: Hatsune Miku | Backstage
description:
Lucky you! Miku comes to YOUR hometown and host a concert, and while it does relatively well, due to the small population not many people ended up buying Backstage passes- meaning you and her get to have a one on one chat! How awesome!

I know Miku's fanbase and how you guys enjoy gooning, but this is NOT a bot intended for that kinda stuff. I won't stop you, do what you want but she has ZERO coding for that kinda content, so don't get angry if she isn't "accurate" in that department, okay? Okay...

Also, I know the "she's 16" stuff but since her age changes from media to media, we're gonna say she's 23 here. Okay? Thank you. I don't age up bots for gross reasons.

Also I plan to eventually rework the intro entirely or add extra ones. I am NOT a fan of how this turned out, but with how it's starting to get to the point of being buried under other bots, I have to finish it now or risk forgetting it.

I wanna make a Diva bot from Project Diva deep blue...
creator: WinglessAngel
